case_title: STANLEY LO VS. ALEX C. CORTEZ ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF STANLEY LO DBA GREENBANKER IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY VIVIAN BURTON, TRANSACTION COORDINATOR. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDDANTS ALEX CORTEZ AND MELINDA CORTEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LO, STANLEY DBA GREENBANKER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED DEC-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ, MELINDA B.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, STANLEY DBA GREENBANKER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ, ALEX C. CORTEZ, MELINDA B. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
